'''ngopabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylarialean|xylarialean]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylarialean|xylarialean]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngopabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngopabithi|ngopabithi]] || [[word:ngopabiji|ngopabiji]] || [[word:ngopabishi|ngopabishi]] || [[word:ngopabiki|ngopabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngopabuthuthu|ngopabuthuthu]] || [[word:ngopabujuju|ngopabujuju]] || [[word:ngopabushushu|ngopabushushu]] || [[word:ngopabukuku|ngopabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngopabuthu|ngopabuthu]] || [[word:ngopabuju|ngopabuju]] || [[word:ngopabushu|ngopabushu]] || [[word:ngopabuku|ngopabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngopabufthuf|ngopabufthuf]] || [[word:ngopabufjuf|ngopabufjuf]] || [[word:ngopabufshuf|ngopabufshuf]] || [[word:ngopabufkuf|ngopabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngopabethe|ngopabethe]] || [[word:ngopabeje|ngopabeje]] || [[word:ngopabeshe|ngopabeshe]] || [[word:ngopabeke|ngopabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngopabothotho|ngopabothotho]] || [[word:ngopabojojo|ngopabojojo]] || [[word:ngopaboshosho|ngopaboshosho]] || [[word:ngopabokoko|ngopabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngopabotho|ngopabotho]] || [[word:ngopabojo|ngopabojo]] || [[word:ngopabosho|ngopabosho]] || [[word:ngopaboko|ngopaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngopabofthof|ngopabofthof]] || [[word:ngopabofjof|ngopabofjof]] || [[word:ngopabofshof|ngopabofshof]] || [[word:ngopabofkof|ngopabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfthĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfjĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfshĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfkĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfthĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfjĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfshĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfkĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfthĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfjĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfshĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopabĂŻfkĂŻf|ngopabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngopabĂŠthĂŠ|ngopabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngopabĂŠjĂŠ|ngopabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngopabĂŠshĂŠ|ngopabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngopabĂŠkĂŠ|ngopabĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngopabathatha|ngopabathatha]] || [[word:ngopabajaja|ngopabajaja]] || [[word:ngopabashasha|ngopabashasha]] || [[word:ngopabakaka|ngopabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngopabatha|ngopabatha]] || [[word:ngopabaja|ngopabaja]] || [[word:ngopabasha|ngopabasha]] || [[word:ngopabaka|ngopabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngopabafthaf|ngopabafthaf]] || [[word:ngopabafjaf|ngopabafjaf]] || [[word:ngopabafshaf|ngopabafshaf]] || [[word:ngopabafkaf|ngopabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngopabasha|ngopabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngopabshĂ«asha|ngopabshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngopabroasha|ngopabroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngopabmuasha|ngopabmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngopabyaasha|ngopabyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongopabnkshĂ«asha|gongopabnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongopabnkroasha|gongopabnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongopabnkmuasha|gongopabnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongopabnkyaasha|gongopabnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngopapabasha|ngopapabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngopapabshĂ«asha|ngopapabshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngopapabroasha|ngopapabroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngopapabmuasha|ngopapabmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngopapabyaasha|ngopapabyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongopapabnkshĂ«asha|gongopapabnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongopapabnkroasha|gongopapabnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongopapabnkmuasha|gongopapabnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongopapabnkyaasha|gongopapabnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngepĂŠbasha|ngepĂŠbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngepĂŠbshĂ«asha|ngepĂŠbshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngepĂŠbroasha|ngepĂŠbroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngepĂŠbmuasha|ngepĂŠbmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngepĂŠbyaasha|ngepĂŠbyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongepĂŠbnkshĂ«asha|gongepĂŠbnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongepĂŠbnkroasha|gongepĂŠbnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongepĂŠbnkmuasha|gongepĂŠbnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongepĂŠbnkyaasha|gongepĂŠbnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngopfabasha|ngopfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngopfabshĂ«asha|ngopfabshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngopfabroasha|ngopfabroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngopfabmuasha|ngopfabmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngopfabyaasha|ngopfabyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongopfabnkshĂ«asha|gongopfabnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongopfabnkroasha|gongopfabnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongopfabnkmuasha|gongopfabnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongopfabnkyaasha|gongopfabnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
